overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a neon-lit city sidewalk at dusk. The scene transitions from an open street with visible sky to a covered overpass area, featuring passing vehicles, cyberpunk architecture, and ending with a view of the Delamain sign hanging from the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk city street with neon commercial signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a metal railing, observing the neon signs and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: metal barrier running along the edge of the sidewalk
pink neon sign with Japanese characters and 'TENGOKU' text
tall industrial electrical tower with multiple cables
cluster of high-rise buildings with construction cranes
large illuminated advertisement screen across the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide cyberpunk city street at dusk, with the camera walking forward along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a metal railing. Neon signs in pink and blue illuminate the right side, while cars pass by on the multi-lane road to the left. The sky is visible with a warm orange-pink gradient, and industrial high-rises with construction cranes dominate the distant skyline.

events.description: passing a pedestrian wearing a bright pink jacket walking in the opposite direction
approaching the overpass causes the scene to gradually darken as sky visibility decreases

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the sidewalk, approaching the overpass structure ahead

notable_agents.action: person in bright pink jacket walking toward and passing the camera

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning across the road ahead
traffic light pole with red signal illuminated

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the open street transitions toward a covered overpass area. A pedestrian in a distinctive bright pink jacket passes by in the opposite direction. The overpass structure looms ahead, gradually occluding the sky and creating a darker, more enclosed atmosphere. Traffic continues to flow on the left as the camera approaches the concrete pillars of the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath highway overpass with commercial signage

events.description: entering the covered area under the overpass, significantly reducing natural light
Delamain sign becomes clearly visible hanging from the overpass structure ahead

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass toward the Delamain sign, with vehicles passing on the left

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving under the overpass with headlights on

entered.detail: large hanging sign with 'DELAMAIN' text and logo suspended from the overpass
concrete underside of the highway bridge creating a roof over the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place entirely under the highway overpass, creating an enclosed urban canyon with artificial lighting. The camera walks toward the prominent Delamain sign hanging from the concrete structure overhead. The metal railing continues along the right, while vehicles with headlights on pass through the dimly lit underpass on the left. The atmosphere shifts from open dusk to a darker, more claustrophobic cyberpunk environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a neon-lit city sidewalk that transitions from an open urban street at dusk into a dark, enclosed overpass. It begins by walking forward past pink and blue neon signs under a warm orange-pink sky, with industrial high-rises and construction cranes visible in the distance. As the camera advances, the open atmosphere shifts as a pedestrian in a bright pink jacket passes by and the looming concrete structure of an overpass begins to occlude the sky. The scene then moves entirely beneath the highway, transforming the environment into a claustrophobic urban canyon illuminated by artificial lights and passing vehicle headlights. Finally, the camera continues along the metal railing, heading deeper into the shadows toward a prominent Delamain sign hanging from the concrete ceiling.
